debug_info.goal:
f : ℕ → ℝ → ℝ
F : ℝ → ℝ
a b : ℝ
hab : a < b
ℓ : ℕ → ℝ
hfint : ∀ (n : ℕ), HasIntegral (f n) a b (ℓ n)
hfF : UnifConv f F
RSdiff : ∀ ε > 0, ∃ N, ∀ n ≥ N, ∀ (M : ℕ), |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| < ε
L : ℝ
hL : SeqLim ℓ L
ε : ℝ
hε : ε > 0
N1 N2 : ℕ
N : ℕ := N1 + N2
Nbnd1 : N1 ≤ N
Nbnd2 : N2 ≤ N
hN1 : |ℓ N - L| < ε / 3
Mmax M : ℕ
hM : M ≥ Mmax
hMmax : |(fun N_1 => RiemannSum (f N) a b N_1) M - ℓ N| < ε / 3
hN2 : |RiemannSum (f N) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| < ε / 3
⊢ |RiemannSum F a b M - L| ≤ |RiemannSum (f N) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| + |RiemannSum (f N) a b M - ℓ N| + |ℓ N - L|

proof:
rw [abs_sub_comm (RiemannSum (f N) a b M) (RiemannSum F a b M)]
  calc |RiemannSum F a b M - L|
    _ = |(RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f N) a b M) + (RiemannSum (f N) a b M - ℓ N) + (ℓ N - L)| := by ring
    _ ≤ |RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f N) a b M| + |RiemannSum (f N) a b M - ℓ N| + |ℓ N - L| := by
      apply le_trans (abs_add _ _)
      apply add_le_add_right
      apply abs_add

  apply abs_sub_le
linarith [b2, hN2, hMmax, hN1]

have h1 := abs_sub_le (RiemannSum F a b M) (RiemannSum (f N) a b M) L
  have h2 := abs_sub_le (RiemannSum (f N) a b M) (ℓ N) L
  rw [abs_sub_comm (RiemannSum F a b M)] at h1
  linarith [h1, h2]

rw [show RiemannSum F a b M - L = (-(RiemannSum (f N) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M) +
    (RiemannSum (f N) a b M - ℓ N)) + (ℓ N - L) by ring]
  apply le_trans (abs_add _ _)
  apply add_le_add_right
  apply le_trans (abs_add _ _)
  rw [abs_neg]
  exact le_refl _

  refine le_trans (abs_sub_le _ (RiemannSum (f N) a b M) _) ?_
  apply add_le_add_left
  apply abs_sub_le
linarith [b2, hN2, hMmax, hN1]
